newsroomStories.title: California College of the Arts announces the 2025 recipients of the Michael and Jeannette Lopez Endowed Scholarship
newsroomStories.listingTitle: California College of the Arts announces the 2025 recipients of the Michael and Jeannette Lopez Endowed Scholarship
newsroomStories.summary: For the third consecutive year, seniors in Fine Arts programs at CCA will receive funds to support the final year of tuition.

image.alt: Detail photo from MFA Fine Arts open studios.
